title: cyclosorus subochthodes
intro: Cyclosorus subochthodes, also known as the subochthodes fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus subochthodes include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus subochthodes is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
